content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty opened -0.42% with IT leading decline (-2.00%) post-Infosys weak guidance. VIX at 18.89 (+1.61%) signals elevated volatility. Book is already 79% deployed with 10 positions — priority is position management, not new entries. Global cues weak (US indices red overnight).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held at -5.9%. However, fundamentals are strong (Q4 PAT +35% YoY, broker upgrades, 52wk high Rs 82.15 last week). CMP 76.68 is above my 73.00 SL. Position appears to have pulled back after a vertical rally (Rs 66 to Rs 82 in two weeks). Tightening SL to 74.50 (below recent swing low ~75.54 on Apr 20) to cap further downside while giving thesis room. Still above SL; not exiting yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 984.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op check: SL already at breakeven 984, target 1100 intact. Since values unchanged, converting to HOLD in position_actions instead. [Note: this is a HOLD — no MODIFY needed]"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Small -1.2% loss. SL 119 gives room. Gold ETF is a defensive hedge in this risk-off environment. Thesis intact; no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1680.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1704.81 is already above entry 1650 (locking +3.3%). CMP 1724.90. However SL at 1704.81 is too tight (only 1.2% below CMP) — one volatile down-tick knocks us out before the breakout-from-52w-high plays out. Loosening SL is NOT allowed per rules, but since 1704.81 > 1680, moving to 1680 would be loosening — REJECTED by guardrails. Leaving as HOLD instead. [This is actually a HOLD]"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1385.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entry 1412.94, CMP 1426.40 (+0.9%). Q4 FY26 was a major beat (+22.6% rev, +27% PAT) with 52wk high hit. Tightening SL from 1350 to 1385 (below recent consolidation support) to reduce risk on the position while preserving target. Risk now ~3% vs original 4.5%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.05,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No change — SL already at breakeven 1049.05, target 1150 intact. Q4 results tomorrow (Apr 25) = binary event risk. Converting to HOLD. [This is a HOLD]"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 665.00,
      "new_target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 681, CMP 689.35 (+1.2%). Q4 results Apr 29 binary event. Tightening SL from 650 to 665 (below recent swing low 666.90 on Apr 22) to cut risk from 4.6% to 2.4% ahead of earnings. Stock near 52wk high — decent risk-reward preserved."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near breakeven (+0.1%). Earnings Apr 30 binary event. SL at 2260 (~4.7% below) is appropriately wide for event. Not trailing tighter yet — need earnings reaction first. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Small -0.4% loss. SL 388 gives adequate room. Power sector theme intact, Q4 results May 15. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 205.00,
      "new_target": 225.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Entry 214, CMP 212.30 (-0.8%). Stock hit 52wk high 217.25 yesterday then pulled back. Per research note, it's already ~18% above consensus target Rs 177 — blow-off top risk. Q4 results Apr 29. Tightening SL from 202 to 205 (below Apr 21 low 201.87 as secondary support, but tighter) and pulling target in to 225 from 235 given street target disconnect. Risk reduced."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 73 to 74.50 to cap further downside; fundamentals still intact but price has given back gains. 10-day exit window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 984. Price at 1002 (+1.8%). Let the trade breathe toward 1050+ before next trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1704.81 already above entry (locking +3.3%). Tightening further would be premature; breakout-to-52w-high needs room. Any proposed loosening would be rejected. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1385.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 1350 to 1385 after Q4 earnings beat and 52wk high. Reduces risk to 2% while preserving 1520 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven. Q4 results tomorrow — binary event. No change ahead of earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 665.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 650 to 665 ahead of Apr 29 earnings binary event, reducing risk from 4.6% to 2.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near breakeven. Earnings Apr 30. SL at 2260 appropriately wide for event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small unrealized loss. SL 388 gives room. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 205.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 202 to 205 given street target disconnect and blow-off signals at 52wk high. Q4 earnings Apr 29."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS (+9% post Q4) interesting but low liquidity + dividend adjustment distortion — avoid. JIOFIN setup mixed (profit fell 14% YoY); prefer to wait. DRREDDY's +8.87% yesterday on 5.6x volume looks extended against bearish fundamental backdrop (ANVISA rejection, Trump tariff overhang) — no action. ONGC bearish per research (crude <$95 hurting upstream). Will revisit tomorrow post-AUBANK earnings.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at the wall. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION. Focus is on trailing SLs to lock in gains on winners (NESTLEIND, GRANULES, ADANIPOWER) and cap downside on laggards (MAHABANK). Three positions have Q4 earnings in the next 6 days: AUBANK (Apr 25), GRANULES (Apr 29), ADANIPOWER (Apr 29), HINDUNILVR (Apr 30). Event risk stacked. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) is ~13% of book — at cluster limit, no more additions. Cash buffer only 21% — tight to minimum. Priority: do not add positions today."
}
